description: 7 GTM engineering automation workflows from Cody Schneider / Greg Isenberg masterclass

features.name: Workspace scaffold: package.json, .env.example with all 12 API keys, src/ structure, apiClient loader helper
LinkedIn Giveaway Auto-Responder: scrape post comments for keyword, DM Notion asset URL to each commenter via LinkedIn API
Bulk Facebook Ad Generator: pain-point variations -> React components -> html2canvas PNG -> zip download + preview UI
Podcast Cold Email Pipeline: Rafonic scrape -> MillionVerifier validate -> Instantly AI campaign enroll
On-the-fly Railway Postgres analysis: spin up DB via API, ingest CSV/URL data, run analysis, output results, teardown
Facebook Ad Performance Optimizer daemon: poll metrics on interval, pause losers, clone winners into scaled ad set
LinkedIn ICP Crawler + Auto Email: PhantomBuster scrape -> email enrichment -> personalized Instantly AI enroll
